// src/pages/student/CartModal.jsx export default function CartModal({ cart, onUpdateQty, onCheckout, onClose }) { const total = cart.reduce((s, i) => s + i.price * i.qty, 0); return (
e.target === e.currentTarget && onClose()}>

🛒 Your Cart

{cart.map(item => (
{item.emoji}
{item.name}
₹{item.price} each
{item.qty}
))}
Total ₹{total}
); }
